title: About Me
subtitle: Passionate about creating safer workplaces through comprehensive safety management and training
description: NEBOSH-certified Safety Officer with 2+ years’ experience in risk assessment, compliance, and safety program implementation. Skilled in identifying hazards, mitigating risks, and fostering a strong safety culture.
Committed to continuous learning and applying the latest safety standards. Known for combining technical expertise with clear communication to ensure safety protocols are effectively adopted.
Computer Science graduate with strong technical knowledge, integrating digital tools and analytical thinking to enhance workplace safety and efficiency.
